# errorCode

**Type**

An integer value that represents an error in the External Purchase Server API.

## Declaration

```swift
int64 errorCode
```

## Error types

- **errorMessage**: A string that describes an error.
- **fieldName**: A string that names a field of a line item.

items.description: A string that describes an error.
items.name: errorMessage
